title: Project Management Officer
required_skills: Tools: Jira, Trello, MS Project, Confluence, Power BI
Knowledge of iGaming compliance, platforms, and player lifecycle
Bachelor's degree in Business / PM / CS or related field
matched_skills: Agile sprint planning and Scrum delivery (HSBC + Hapag-Lloyd)
Power BI — certified, used for KPI reporting and data storytelling
C-level / executive reporting and dashboards (HSBC PMO)
Risk escalation and prioritisation management (HSBC USD 8M programme)
KPI framework design and performance tracking (Hapag-Lloyd)
Budget tracking and cost optimisation (USD 8M programme)
Hybrid Agile-Waterfall awareness — Agile delivery within structured programme governance
missing_skills: iGaming industry knowledge (platforms, player lifecycle, GLI compliance)
iGaming-specific regulatory compliance (GDPR application in gambling context, GLI standards)
Explicit Waterfall project management experience (CV is predominantly Agile)
Jira / Confluence / MS Project — not explicitly listed in CV (inferred from context only)
key_requirements: Design and implement a hybrid Agile-Waterfall project management framework
Monitor risks, dependencies, and progress across all concurrent initiatives
Standardize governance templates (charters, backlogs, approval flows) and ensure iGaming regulatory compliance
Define and track KPIs (sprint velocity, completion rates, ROI) with executive dashboards
Mentor teams on Agile and Waterfall methodologies and align projects with strategic vision
core_responsibilities: Align projects with company vision, strategic goals, and iGaming market demands
Own centralized task management system and define workflows and accountability
Develop hybrid processes and standardize templates for project governance
Maintain executive dashboards and report on project health and resource utilisation
cv_highlights: Led PMO for USD 8M digital transformation programme at HSBC — direct match to programme governance, budget tracking, and C-suite reporting
Power BI certified — directly matches tooling requirement for executive dashboards
Agile sprint coordination at Hapag-Lloyd — demonstrates iterative delivery experience in a large corporate environment
Risk escalation and prioritisation management — explicitly listed as a core responsibility in JD
KPI framework design — matches JD requirement to define and track performance metrics
Multilingual (English, German, Chinese, Cantonese) — strong asset for international remote team
CET timezone compatible (based in Lüneburg, Germany)
gaps: No iGaming industry experience — this is a stated hard requirement; candidate comes from banking and logistics
iGaming compliance specifics (GLI standards, gambling-specific GDPR application) are entirely absent from CV
Waterfall methodology not explicitly evidenced — HSBC work was Agile within a structured programme, not classic Waterfall
Jira, Confluence, MS Project not explicitly named in CV — may be inferred but not verified
recommended_emphasis: Lead with PMO governance credentials: USD 8M HSBC programme, governance framework design, and C-suite reporting — these directly mirror the JD's governance and reporting requirements
Highlight Power BI certification prominently as it is an exact tooling match for executive dashboards
Frame HSBC programme as hybrid governance (structured phases with Agile sprints) to address the hybrid Agile-Waterfall requirement
Emphasise risk escalation and KPI framework experience — both appear verbatim as JD responsibilities
Address iGaming gap proactively in cover letter: position banking and fintech compliance experience (GDPR, regulatory reporting) as transferable to iGaming compliance context
Mention any tool experience with Jira, Confluence, or MS Project even if informal, to close the tooling gap
recommendation: Strong apply. Boru's PMO methodology, governance, Power BI, and executive reporting skills are an excellent structural match for this role. The primary gap is iGaming industry knowledge, which is a stated requirement but is learnable — the core PMO competencies are harder to develop and Boru clearly has them. The remote CET setup is ideal. A tailored cover letter that explicitly bridges banking/fintech regulatory experience to iGaming compliance will significantly improve conversion odds.
